scripts.web:dev: yarn exec dotenv -- yarn workspace @linkwarden/web dev
scripts.web:build: yarn exec dotenv -- yarn workspace @linkwarden/web build
scripts.web:build:debug: yarn exec dotenv -- yarn workspace @linkwarden/web build:debug
scripts.web:start: yarn exec dotenv -- yarn workspace @linkwarden/web start
scripts.worker:dev: yarn exec dotenv -- yarn workspace @linkwarden/worker dev
scripts.worker:start: yarn exec dotenv -- yarn workspace @linkwarden/worker start
scripts.concurrently:dev: concurrently "yarn exec dotenv -- yarn workspace @linkwarden/web dev" "yarn exec dotenv -- yarn workspace @linkwarden/worker dev" "yarn extension:dev"
scripts.concurrently:start: concurrently "yarn exec dotenv -- yarn workspace @linkwarden/web start" "yarn exec dotenv -- yarn workspace @linkwarden/worker start"
scripts.prisma:deploy: yarn exec dotenv -- yarn workspace @linkwarden/prisma deploy
scripts.prisma:dev: yarn exec dotenv -- yarn workspace @linkwarden/prisma dev
